compatibilityNotes.requirement: Tested on: cross-platform (macOS, Linux, Windows via Git Bash)
compatibilityNotes.adaptationHint: The workflow steps, models, and parameters are cross-platform. Only shell commands, file paths, and OS-specific package manager calls may need adjustment for a different OS.

compatibilityNotes.requirement: Requires runtime: Any AI coding agent with skill support
compatibilityNotes.adaptationHint: Check whether Any AI coding agent with skill support is installed. The rest of the kit is independent of this runtime.
The core workflow logic is platform-independent. Only the claude-code-specific API calls and configuration may need adjustment if the user's integration target differs.

compatibilityNotes.requirement: The reference implementation uses Claude Code and CLAUDE.md. To adapt for other agents, replace CLAUDE.md with your agent's instruction file and map the 5 skills to your agent's skill/command system. The core principle — external state files that survive context windows — is LLM-agnostic.
